framework.name: Two-Mode Agent Authorization Model
framework.description: Distinguishes between 'human present' (real-time purchases requiring explicit cart approval) and 'human not present' (delegated tasks with pre-authorized Intent Mandates containing constraints). Different authorization flows for interactive vs autonomous agent behavior. Intent Mandates for delegated tasks specify 'rules of engagement' including price limits and conditions.
framework.raw_quote: Real-time purchases (human present): your request is captured in an initial Intent Mandate... After the agent presents a cart, your approval signs a Cart Mandate. Delegated tasks (human not present): you sign a detailed Intent Mandate upfront. This mandate specifies the rules of engagement: price limits, timing, and other conditions.
